experience.title: 3D Development
experience.subtitle: A 3D Development Specialist focuses on creating, optimizing, and implementing interactive 3D environments and assets using engines and frameworks such as Three.js and Unity. They work with 3D modeling tools, scene composition, shaders, and scripting to deliver high-quality real-time experiences. Knowledge of rendering pipelines, performance optimization, asset workflows, and platform-specific deployment is essential for the role.
